Class AlgorithmContext<G>

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.AlgorithmContext<G>
public final class AlgorithmContext<G> extends Object
Immutable runtime context passed to algorithms.

    AlgorithmContext.Builder<G>
    Builder to keep algorithm setup explicit and readable.
